markdownRemark.html: This week, I was feeling pretty overwhelmed. A good friend has disappeared recently. I’ve been working a lot. And, brought on by my desire, a shit ton of surfing.

frontmatter.meta: Week 16, I had a great week surfing and felt pretty tired besides that.
frontmatter.title: Week 16, great surfing week and feeling tired from feeling busy
